message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update beads JSONL with 2 new issue records reflecting latest
task creation and status tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-37ki","title":"Add fallback release notes workflow for manual releases","description":"When GoReleaser fails and binaries are uploaded manually through GitHub UI, the release gets no release notes. Need a fallback workflow that auto-generates notes for any release with minimal/empty body.

Implementation:

1. Create .github/workflows/release-notes-fallback.yml:
   triggers:
     on:
       release:
         types: [created, edited]
   permissions:
     contents: write

2. Detection logic:
   - Fetch release body via gh api
   - Skip if body length >= 100 chars (already has meaningful notes)
   - Skip if body contains "## " (has markdown headers = intentional content)
   - Skip if body contains idempotency marker "<!-- auto-generated-notes -->"
   - Skip draft releases (only process published releases)

3. Previous tag detection:
   ```bash
   CURRENT_TAG="${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}"
   PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 --exclude="$CURRENT_TAG" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
   if [ -z "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
     PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git rev-list --max-parents=0 HEAD | head -1)
   fi
   ```

4. Generate release notes via GitHub API:
   gh api repos/$REPO/releases/generate-notes \
     -f tag_name="$CURRENT_TAG" \
     -f previous_tag_name="$PREVIOUS_TAG" \
     --jq .body

5. Apply changelog filters matching .goreleaser.yaml (lines 33-38):
   - Exclude lines starting with "* docs:" or "* test:" or "* chore:"
   - Preserve all other commit types (feat, fix, refactor, perf, etc.)

6. Append idempotency marker to prevent duplicate runs:
   BODY="$GENERATED_NOTES\n\n<!-- auto-generated-notes -->"

7. Update release:
   gh api repos/$REPO/releases/$RELEASE_ID \
     -X PATCH \
     -f body="$BODY"

8. Error handling:
   - GitHub API rate limit (429): retry with exponential backoff (3 attempts)
   - Permission errors (403): fail with clear message about token permissions
   - Empty generated notes: append "No notable changes in this release." instead of leaving blank
   - Tag format validation: support both v-prefixed (v1.2.3) and bare (1.2.3) tags
   - First release (no previous tag): include all commits from initial commit

EDGE CASES:
- Release body has markdown but < 100 chars: check for "## " header to avoid overwriting intentional content
- Previous tag is ancient (1000+ commits): GitHub API handles pagination, notes may be truncated
- Multiple releases created rapidly: each triggers independently; idempotency marker prevents double-write
- GoReleaser runs AFTER manual release: GoReleaser updates body, next edit event re-triggers but marker prevents overwrite
- Non-semver tag format (release-20260206): git describe still works, API generates notes normally
- Release body has HTML entities: API returns raw markdown, no entity issues

TESTS:

Integration Tests (GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch for manual testing):
- test_manual_release_empty_body: create release with empty body -> notes generated
- test_manual_release_short_body: body = "bugfix" -> notes generated (< 100 chars)
- test_manual_release_long_body: body = 200 chars of real notes -> skipped (has content)
- test_manual_release_with_headers: body = "## Notes\nSomething" -> skipped (has ## header)
- test_idempotency: run workflow twice -> body unchanged on second run (marker detected)
- test_first_release: no previous tag -> all commits included
- test_draft_release: draft release -> skipped (only published)

E2E Tests (run in CI after workflow creation):
- test_goreleaser_then_fallback: GoReleaser succeeds -> fallback skips (body already populated)
- test_goreleaser_fail_then_manual: GoReleaser fails, manual upload -> fallback fills notes
- test_filter_docs_test_commits: verify docs: and test: commits excluded from generated notes
- test_empty_changelog: only docs/test commits between tags -> "No notable changes" message

Manual Verification Checklist:
- [ ] Create manual release via GitHub UI with empty body
- [ ] Verify workflow triggers within 60 seconds
- [ ] Verify release body populated with filtered changelog
- [ ] Verify idempotency marker present in body source
- [ ] Re-trigger workflow -> body unchanged
- [ ] Compare output with GoReleaser-generated notes for consistency

 {"id":"bd-3fqy","title":"TOON: Update --help and robot help docs","description":"Document TOON format in CLI help.

## Files
- `cmd/bv/main.go` - Flag help text
- README.md - Usage examples

## Help Text
```
OUTPUT FORMAT
  --format toon    Token-optimized output (~50% fewer tokens than JSON)
  BV_OUTPUT_FORMAT=toon   Environment variable alternative
```

## README Addition
```markdown
### Token-Optimized Output (TOON)

For AI agents, TOON format reduces token usage by ~50%:

\`\`\`bash
bv --robot-triage --format toon
bv --robot-insights --format toon
export BV_OUTPUT_FORMAT=toon
\`\`\`
```","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T07:20:37.084755450Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T07:06:50.264355110Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T07:06:50.264332086Z","close_reason":"Already implemented - --robot-help includes format documentation, --format flag has help text","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-s8wz","title":"TOON: Add E2E shell script tests","description":"E2E verification script for TOON integration.

## File
`scripts/test_bv_toon.sh`

## Test Cases
1. Format flag tests (`--format json`, `--format toon`)
2. Env var tests (`BV_OUTPUT_FORMAT`, `TOON_DEFAULT_FORMAT`)
3. Precedence tests (CLI overrides env)
4. Round-trip verification (encode → decode → compare)
5. Token savings measurement (>= 40% target)
6. All 35+ robot commands work with TOON

## Script Template
```bash
#!/bin/bash
bv --robot-triage > /tmp/triage.json
bv --robot-triage --format toon > /tmp/triage.toon
tru --decode /tmp/triage.toon > /tmp/decoded.json
diff <(jq -S . /tmp/triage.json) <(jq -S . /tmp/decoded.json)
echo "Round-trip OK"
```","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T07:22:15.679571934Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T18:01:12.394667119Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T18:01:12.394648224Z","close_reason":"Test script completed and passing - test_toon_e2e.sh covers all requirements","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-sfad","title":"Test: release notes fallback workflow correctness","description":"## What
Test the release-notes-fallback workflow (bd-t8dx) to verify it correctly populates empty releases.

## Test Plan

### Test 1: Workflow YAML validation
1. Run `gh workflow list -R Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer` to verify workflow is registered
2. Validate YAML syntax: `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(\".github/workflows/release-notes-fallback.yml\"))"` 
3. Verify trigger is `on: release: types: [created, edited]`
4. Log: workflow name, triggers, jobs

### Test 2: Idempotency marker test
1. Create a draft release with body containing "<!-- auto-generated -->"
2. Trigger workflow (or simulate the logic)
3. Verify: body is NOT overwritten (idempotency marker detected)
4. Delete draft release
5. Log: release body before/after

### Test 3: Empty release gets notes
1. Create a draft release with empty body
2. Run the generate-notes API: `gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/releases/generate-notes -f tag_name=v0.14.4`
3. Verify: non-empty notes returned
4. Delete draft release
5. Log: generated notes content, character count

### Test 4: Existing notes are preserved
1. Create a draft release with body "Manual release notes here"
2. Verify: workflow would NOT overwrite (body length > 50 chars)
3. Delete draft release
4. Log: body content, skip reason

## Acceptance Criteria
- YAML is valid and workflow registers
- Idempotency prevents double-write
- Empty releases get auto-generated notes
- Manual releases are not overwritten","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T18:37:07.112634091Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T18:41:35.152036737Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T18:41:35.152017390Z","close_reason":"done","external_ref":"gh:Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer#99/test","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","release","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-sfad","depends_on_id":"bd-t8dx","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T18:37:11.746934358Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
